---

## Pipeline stage

- [ ] Extraction
- [ ] Manual gate
- [ ] Cleaning

## Minimal example

Please use a short synthetic example or a very small excerpt you have the right to share.

```text
Observed:

Expected:
```

## Why is this safe to fix?

Explain whether the pattern repeats, has structural signals, or has low false-positive risk.

## Possible false positives

Describe where the proposed fix might break valid text.

## Notes

Add any context about PDF/OCR quality, language, book type, or layout.
